content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services built around what boat owners in the Chesapeake Bay region and South Florida actually need — reliable work done right, without the runaround.

Our team handles everything from thorough boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater services, marine AC and climate control systems, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey before closing a deal, hull cleaning and underwater inspections, a cooling system overhaul in the South Florida heat, or a complete sanitation system refit, we bring the same level of care and attention to every job. We understand that each of these systems plays a critical role in how your boat performs and how comfortable life aboard actually is.

At Ben's Boatworks, we know your boat represents a significant investment — and we treat it that way. We serve boat owners across a wide area, from the Annapolis waterfront and surrounding Chesapeake communities to South Florida waters up to 60 miles out. Our clients range from first-time buyers needing a solid inspection before purchase to experienced boaters who just want a team they can trust to keep things running. We have built our reputation one job at a time, and we plan to keep it that way.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing. Serving South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A professional boat survey covers a thorough evaluation of a vessel's structural integrity, mechanical systems, and safety equipment — giving buyers, sellers, and insurers an accurate picture of the boat's true condition. Our inspections follow established marine surveying standards and are commonly required for insurance purposes or pre-purchase due diligence.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services include hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, line and debris removal, and general below-the-waterline assessments without the need to haul out. Keeping the underwater portion of your vessel clean and intact is essential to performance, fuel efficiency, and long-term hull health.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: We service, repair, and install marine air conditioning and climate control systems, including raw water-cooled units common on cruising and liveaboard vessels. Proper maintenance of seawater strainers, pumps, and refrigerant levels keeps your system running efficiently and extends the life of the equipment.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Our marine plumbing and sanitation work covers holding tank systems, through-hull fittings, bilge pumps, freshwater systems, and marine head installations and repairs. A properly maintained sanitation system keeps your vessel compliant with marine regulations and ensures a clean, functional environment aboard.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for buyers
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement without haul-out
Marine air conditioning system repair and seasonal maintenance
Holding tank and marine sanitation system installation or refit
Through-hull fitting inspection and seacock replacement or service
Propeller and running gear inspection via professional dive service
Freshwater system troubleshooting and bilge pump repair or upgrade
